// why this file: Compiles the pure reports label helpers (lib/labels.ts) + node:test
suite. rootDir is the app workspace root (../..) because labels.ts
type-imports Lang from src/i18n/strings, which lands in the program and
is emitted under dist-test/src/. NodeNext + CommonJS detection (this
package.json has no type:module) keeps extensionless relative imports
valid for both Metro and the compiled node run.
